subject: [str-3ky9.15] Refactoring recs for hard-to-mock deps
description: Detect hard-to-mock calls (dynamic dispatch, closures, subprocess spawning, multi-layer indirection). Produce refactoring recommendations in scan output: extract to parameter, wrap in named function, move behind interface. Branch: str-3ky9.15. See `bd show str-3ky9.15`.
